across.clue: To absorb a liquid means to take it inside.
To depart is to leave some place so you can go to another place.
a first payment that you make when you agree to buy or rent something expensive such as a car or house.
Cumulative describes an increase by adding one after another.
To gradually become thinner and weaker over a period of time, usually because of an illness. | waste ___
When a behavior is pathological, it is extreme, unacceptable, and sometimes a symptom of disease.
To derive means to come, or originate, from a thing or place.
Capitalism is an economic system where private companies make goods for profit.
To counsel someone means to give advice or guidance.
Exempt means not required to do something.

down.clue: A farewell is an instance of saying goodbye or a way to say it.
When someone is accountable, he or she is responsible for the effects of his or her actions.
When something or someone is devoid of a thing, they are missing it.
A civilization is a human society with its own social organization and culture.
to say that you are pleased to accept or consider something such as an opportunity or a question
If something is ambiguous, it is not entirely clear.
A platform is something that allows someone to tell a large number of people about an idea, product, etc.
To inflate something means to fill it up with air.
To enable is to make it possible for something to happen.
